title: Wapol Notices the Flag

scene: Wapol Notices the Flag. The story turns inward to Chopper’s isolation, his fear of humans, and the painful memories behind his bond with Dr. Hiriluk. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.
